mapper.insert: insert into special_offer (product_id, original_price, offer_price, stock, start_time, end_time, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{productId}, #{originalPrice}, #{offerPrice}, #{stock}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select id, product_id as productId, original_price as originalPrice, offer_price as offerPrice, stock, start_time as startTime, end_time as endTime, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from special_offer order by id desc
